active_ingredients: Active Ingredients Petrolatum USP 58.95% Anhydrous Lanolin USP 35%
indications_and_usage: Indications: Temporarily relieves minor burns, dry, chapped, fissured and macerated skin and lips, also relieves Psoriais, Eczema, mild sunburn, abrasions and contusions, diaper dermatitis, hemorrhoids, and prickly heat.
dosage_and_administration: Directions: Apply a thin film to clean, dry skin three times daily. May be covered with sterile gauze, if desired.
